    ]} />;

Contact Form
With Custom Class
stories.snippet:
const WithCustomClass = () => <Form
    className="my-custom-form"
    onSubmit={(target) => console.log('Custom form submitted')}>
    <FormContentWrapper>
        <TextInput label="Field 1" />
        <PrimaryButton type="submit">Submit</PrimaryButton>
    </FormContentWrapper>
</Form>;
